name: Little Cheddar Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine the flour, dry mustard, paprika, and baking powder.
2. Beat the butter until light and fluffy using a hand mixer or electric mixer at medium speed.
3. Gradually add the grated cheddar cheese and Worcestershire sauce to the butter mixture.
4. Slowly incorporate the flour mixture into the dough, stirring with an rk (unspecified tool) until well blended.
5. On a lightly floured surface, shape the dough into a long roll about 1 3/4 inches in diameter.
6. Wrap the dough in plastic wrap or foil and refrigerate for at least 2 hours, preferably overnight.
7. Preheat the oven to 325 degrees F (163 degrees C).
8. Slice the dough into pieces about 1/3 inch thick using your hands.
9. Roll each slice into a ball, then flatten slightly.
10. Place the flattened biscuits on an ungreased baking sheet about 2 inches apart.
11. Bake for 8 minutes in the preheated oven. The biscuits will only brown slightly on the bottom.
